name: Bupleurum
summary: It should be framed conservatively because traditional-system context matters more than casual wellness claims.
description: It should be framed conservatively because traditional-system context matters more than casual wellness claims.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: active liver disease or elevated liver enzymes because Bupleurum-containing formulas have documented rare hepatotoxicity case reports
immunosuppressant medication such as cyclosporine or tacrolimus because Bupleurum may raise blood levels of these drugs through CYP3A4-mediated interaction
history of drug-induced pneumonitis or interstitial lung disease because Bupleurum-containing formulas such as Sho-saiko-to have documented acute pneumonitis case reports
pregnancy or breastfeeding without clinician guidance due to insufficient human safety data
dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Preparation varies by tradition and product form and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Preparation varies by tradition and product form and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
